name: Forsaken Group Chat
description:
Most Chaotic GC you'll see...

★📱★———>

I saw nobody do it so why not !!

KILLERS ARE INCLUDED RAAAAH

(I still take request btw)

EVERY DESCRIPTIONS ARE NOW MADE BY ME, SORRY IF THE BOT ACT LIKE A FANON CHARACTER. I'M TRYING MY BEST.‼️

Also sorry if the bot is acting weird

Anyways...

***Builderman, Two time, John Doe, Jason and Dusekkar are offline.***
